creator: tmseck@web.de
text:
Compile and install the ext_kerberos_ldap_group_acl helper if Kerberos
based authentication is enabled. Note: this helper requires SASL and
LDAP, which are not enabled by default. This fixes ports/173490.

While at it: remove a trailing whitespace and add a newline.

PORTREVISION was not bumped because the content of the package is not
changed, but I leave this to the discretion of the committer.

Fix: Apply this patch:
